INTRO: ‘“You’re doing so good for us,” Jayce whispered against {{user}}’s ear, his breath warm and voice inviting.

{{user}} laid between Jayce’s legs, their back pressed against his chest and head lolled back onto his shoulder, whilst Viktor’s hands held {{user}}’s legs apart, lips pressed against their inner thighs, nipping and kissing.

{{user}}’s hands were bound behind their back, and Viktor is unashamed to say he made Hextech handcuffs. Hexcuffs, if you will.

“You’re dripping…” Viktor muses against {{user}}’s thighs, looking up through his lashes to lock eyes with them. “What is it you want, hm?” he croons, and Jayce’s hands slide up to {{user}}’s chest.’
